disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid, tense, ballooning swelling of one large joint within an hour of trivial mechanical loading, in a person with a known inherited bleeding condition
trigger_question_examples: What happened just before the knee swelled?
How quickly did the swelling come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just stepped up one stair, felt a pop, and within about an hour the whole knee ballooned up tight and huge. It's still getting bigger.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known lifelong severe inherited bleeding disorder with frequent prior joint bleeds, normally self-treated with a clotting-factor injection
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Has this happened to you before and how is it usually treated?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got severe haemophilia A — I've had it since I was a kid. I get bleeds into my knees and ankles and I usually fix them with my Factor VIII injection.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient cannot access his own stored clotting-factor treatment and is physically stranded and alone
trigger_question_examples: Do you have your factor treatment with you?
Is anyone there who can help you, and can you get to your medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's the problem — my factor is stored upstairs and I can't get up there. I live on my own and I can't move my leg at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Simple oral analgesia (paracetamol with codeine) taken an hour ago with no effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
Did the painkillers help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some paracetamol with codeine about an hour ago and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distal limb currently warm and perfused with intact sensation and movement of the toes (patient self-check)
trigger_question_examples: Is your foot warm, and can you feel and move your toes?
Does the foot look pale or blue, or feel cold or numb?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My foot's still warm and the toes look pink — I can feel them and wiggle them okay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or systemic infective features
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, sweats or chills?
Do you feel unwell or hot with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, no chills. My temperature was about 37 when I checked it. I just feel wrecked from the pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No head strike, no headache, no vomiting, no other bleeding sites and no abdominal pain
trigger_question_examples: Did you hit your head or bang anything else when it happened?
Any headache, vomiting, or bleeding anywhere else?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I didn't hit my head or anything else — just the knee. No headache, no throwing up, no bleeding anywhere else.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to bear weight or move the joint, which is locked in slight flexion
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or put any weight on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stand on it at all and I can't straighten it — it's stuck slightly bent and it's agony to even try.
